# TrimEditor

> TrimEditor is a Kotlin Paper plugin by Jan1k (GitHub: Jan1k1) for editing Minecraft armor trims on the item a player is holding.

Canonical docs for AI tools:

- [Project llms.txt](https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/llms.txt): Curated AI index.
- [Full AI summary](https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/llms-full.txt): Single-file project context.
- [Documentation](https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/): User docs.
- [API](https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/api/): Public API for plugins such as KiteEditor.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Jan1k1/TrimEditor): Source code.

Maintainer: Jan1k / Jan1k1. Portfolio: https://jan1k.org/
